notes: Processes metallic ore feedstocks and carbon precursors into structural alloys, carbon composites, and advanced aerospace alloys.
throughput_mult scales batch completion speed relative to the recipe's base build_time_s.
efficiency is the fraction of listed input materials consumed; values below 1.0 represent yield improvements from process control.
All refineries in this family can process all metallurgy recipes in-domain from tech 1 onward.
max_concurrent_recipes is the number of recipe slots running in parallel.
Draws electric_mw from the ship or base power bus continuously while active.
Usable at any location — orbital, surface, or microgravity habitat. No gravity requirement.
